## Project

**Slug:** 
**Homepage:** 
**Repo (if public):** 

## Checklist

- [ ] Folder at `registry/projects/<slug>/` with `project.json`
- [ ] Folder name matches `id` and `slug` in `project.json`
- [ ] `url` loads publicly (no auth required to view the landing page)
- [ ] `description` is a clear, honest 12–280 char elevator pitch
- [ ] `chainIds` reflects actual usage (empty array `[]` if your project is off-chain)
- [ ] `requiresWallet` is accurately set
- [ ] `usesConsoleNetwork` is accurately set (`false` is fine — you'll be listed as "adjacent")
- [ ] Cover and/or icon image included (optional but recommended)
- [ ] `registry/index.json` regenerated (`node scripts/build-registry.mjs`)
- [ ] I've read and agree to the [Code of Conduct](../CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md)
- [ ] My project is not a scam, phishing site, or illegal content; I understand this listing can be revoked at any time
